nasb.text: ‘Thus says the Lord God, “This also I will let the house of Israel ask Me to do for them: I will increase their men like a flock.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God: This also I will let the house of Israel ask me to do for them: to increase their people like a flock.

cnv.text: “‘主耶和華這樣說：我還要讓以色列家求我為他們增加人數，多如羊群。

ccb.text: “主耶和华说，‘我要再次答应以色列人的恳求，使他们的人口增加，多如羊群。
